lines.en_lit: a mitzva to brush supports Rabbi Ami, as Rabbi Ami said: It is prohibited for a man to go out with the drops that are on his legs, because he appears as one whose penis has been severed. and spread rumors about his children that they are mamzerim.

Rav Pappa said: excrement in its place, it is prohibited to recite Shema What are the circumstances? If that is visible, obvious If that is not visible, The Torah was not given to the ministering angels, No, necessary where he is sitting it is visible, he is standing it is not visible.

what is different from excrement on his flesh? As it was stated excrement on his flesh or that his hands were into a bathroom Rav Huna said: permitted to recite Shema. And Rav Ḥisda said: prohibited to recite Shema in its place the filth is great And not in its place, its filth is not great,

The Sages taught a halakha with regard to a meal A person exits to urinate washes one his hands, and enters spoke with another, and lingered washes both of his hands and enters And when one washes not wash outside and then enter, due to suspicion Rather, he enters and sits in his place and washes both his hands, and returns the jug to the guests
Rav Ḥisda said: We said only to drink; however, to eat wash outside and enter. it is well known that he is fastidious Rav Naḥman bar Yitzḥak said: And I even to drink, they know that I am fastidious

MISHNA: A person does not enter the courtyard for the service, even pure, until he immerses. Five immersions and ten sanctifications High Priest immerses and sanctifies on the day And all in the sacred on Hall of Parva, except for this alone. They spread a sheet of fine linen between him and the people sanctified his hands and feet.

GEMARA: They asked ben Zoma this immersion: Why He said to them: Just as one who moves from sacred to sacred from an area that is punished by karet, to area that is punished by karet, requires immersion; one who moves from a non-sacred to a sacred and from a place that is not punished by karet to a place that is punished by karet, is it not right that he require immersion?
Rabbi Yehuda says: It is an ancillary immersion, so that one will remember any old impurity that he and withdraw.
With regard to what do disagree?
